title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 253.043 - Park boundary conflicts, department authorized to convey up to five acres as part of land trade, conditions
text:
253.043.  Park boundary conflicts, department authorized to convey up to five acres as part of land trade, conditions. — The department is authorized to convey up to five acres of land as part of a land trade with adjacent property owners to resolve park boundary conflicts, so long as the department receives land of equal or greater fair market value in exchange.
(L. 2003 S.B. 606)
